## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change that solves it.

## Validation

List the checks you ran and any testing that remains.

## Checklist

- [ ] The pull request title uses Conventional Commits.
- [ ] Relevant tests and documentation are updated.
- [ ] No copyrighted ROMs, disc images, firmware, keys, or personal files are included.
- [ ] I have read the contribution guide and code of conduct.
